actions.script: var googleBtn = document.querySelector('div.chakra-button[aria-label="Google"]') || document.querySelector('button:has(img[alt="Google logo"])'); var links = document.querySelectorAll('a'); var hasSignIn = false; for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.indexOf('Sign in') !== -1 || links[i].textContent.indexOf('Sign up') !== -1 || links[i].textContent.indexOf('Log in') !== -1) { hasSignIn = true; break; } } if (googleBtn || hasSignIn || window.location.pathname.indexOf('sign-in') !== -1) { return 'not_logged_in'; } return 'logged_in';
